issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for Percy integration.

scenarios.name: Integrate Percy into existing Cypress suite with responsive widths and animation suppression
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs @percy/cli and @percy/cypress, imports @percy/cypress in cypress/support/e2e.js, calls cy.percySnapshot, and adds .percy.yml with widths [375,768,1280] plus percy-css disabling animations; baseline references percy-cypress vaguely without the .percy.yml widths/percy-css details.

scenarios.name: Wire Percy into Playwright tests and GitHub Actions CI with PERCY_TOKEN
scenarios.rationale: Treatment installs @percy/playwright, uses percySnapshot(page, name), wraps test command with npx percy exec -- playwright test, and configures PERCY_TOKEN from secrets in the workflow; baseline lists Percy at a high level but does not show the percy exec wrap or token wiring.
